ne_geralt.flavor: If that's what it takes to save the world, it'd better to let that world die.

ne_ciri.flavor: Know when fairy tales cease to be tales? When people start believing in them.

ne_yennefer.ability: Medic: Choose one card from your discard pile and play it instantly (no Heroes or Special Cards). Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities.
ne_yennefer.flavor: Magic is Chaos, Art and Science. It is a curse, a blessing and a progression.

ne_triss.ability: Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities.
ne_triss.flavor: I can take care of myself. Trust me.

ne_mysterious_elf.ability: Spy: Place on your opponent's battlefield (counts towards opponent's total) and draw 2 cards from your deck. Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities.

ne_dandelion.ability: Commander's Horn: Doubles the strength of all unit cards in that row. Limited to 1 per row.
ne_dandelion.flavor: Dandelion, you're a cynic, a lecher, a whoremonger, a liar - and my best friend.

ne_zoltan.flavor: Life without old mates and booze is like a woman without a rump.

ne_regis.flavor: Men, the polite ones, at least, would call me a monster. A blood-drinking freak.

ne_villentretenmerth.ability: Scorch - Close Combat: Destroy your enemy's strongest Close Combat unit(s) if the combined strength of all his or her Close Combat units is 10 or more.
ne_villentretenmerth.flavor: Also calls himself Borkh Three Jackdaws... he's not the best at names.

ne_vesemir.flavor: If you're to be hanged, ask for water. Anything can happen before they fetch it.

ne_olgierd.ability: Morale boost: Adds +1 to all units in the row (excluding itself). Agile: Can be placed in either the Close Combat or the Ranged Combat row. Cannot be moved once placed.
ne_olgierd.flavor: At least you now know I don't easily lose my head

ne_gaunter_odimm.ability: Muster: Find any cards with the same name in your deck and play them instantly.
ne_gaunter_odimm.flavor: He always grants exactly what you wish for. That's the problem.

ne_gaunter_darkness.ability: Muster: Find any cards with the same name in your deck and play them instantly.
ne_gaunter_darkness.flavor: Fear not the shadows, but the light.

ne_decoy.ability: Swap with a card on the battlefield to return it to your hand.
ne_decoy.flavor: When you run out of peasants, decoys also make decent arrow fodder.

ne_horn.ability: Doubles the strength of all unit cards in that row. Limited to 1 per row.
ne_horn.flavor: Plus one to morale, minus three to hearing.

ne_scorch.ability: Scorch: Discards after playing. Kills the strongest card(s) on the battlefield.
ne_scorch.flavor: Pillars of flame turn the mightiest to ash. All others tremble in shock and awe.

ne_frost.ability: Sets the strength of all Close Combat cards to 1 for both players.
ne_frost.flavor: Best part about frost - bodies of the fallen don't rot so quickly.

ne_fog.ability: Sets the strength of all Ranged Combat cards to 1 for both players.
ne_fog.flavor: A good commander's dream... a bad one's horror.

ne_rain.ability: Sets the strength of all Siege Combat cards to 1 for both players.
ne_rain.flavor: Even the rain in this land smells like piss.

ne_storm.ability: Reduces the Strength of all Range and Siege Units to 1.
ne_storm.flavor: This ain't no normal storm. This here's the wrath of the gods.

ne_clear.ability: Removes all Weather Card (Biting Frost, Impenetrable Fog and Torrential Rain) effects.
ne_clear.flavor: The sun's shinin', Dromle! The sun's shinin'! Maybe there's hope left after all...

nr_vernon_roche.ability: Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities.
nr_vernon_roche.flavor: A patriot... and a real son of a bitch.

nr_john_natalis.ability: Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities.
nr_john_natalis.flavor: That square should bear the names of my soldiers, of the dead. Not mine.

nr_esterad_thyssen.ability: Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities.
nr_esterad_thyssen.flavor: Like all Thyssen men, he was tall, powerfully built and criminally handsome.

nr_philippa_eilhart.ability: Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities.
nr_philippa_eilhart.flavor: Soon the power of kings will wither, and the Lodge shall seize its rightful place.

nr_thaler.ability: Spy: Place on your opponent's battlefield (counts towards opponent's total) and draw 2 cards from your deck.
nr_thaler.flavor: Fuck off! We aren't all ploughin' philanderers. Some of us have depth...

nr_dijkstra.ability: Spy: Place on your opponent's battlefield (counts towards opponent's total) and draw 2 cards from your deck.
nr_dijkstra.flavor: Gwent's like politics, just more honest.

nr_stennis.ability: Spy: Place on your opponent's battlefield (counts towards opponent's total) and draw 2 cards from your deck.
nr_stennis.flavor: He ploughin' wears golden armor. Golden. 'Course he's an arsehole.

nr_ves.flavor: Better to live one day as a king than a whole life as a beggar.

nr_siegfried.flavor: We're on the same side, witcher. You'll realize this one day.

nr_yarpen.flavor: The world belongs to whoever's best at crackin' skulls and impregnatin' lasses.

nr_sile.flavor: The Lodge lacks humility. Our lust for power may yet be our undoing.

nr_keira.flavor: If I'm to die today, I wish to look smashing for the occasion.

nr_sabrina.flavor: The Daughter of the Kaedweni Wilderness.

nr_sheldon.flavor: I was there, on the front lines! Right where the fightin' was the thickest!

nr_dethmold.flavor: I once made a prisoner vomit his own entrails... Ah, good times...

nr_blue_stripes.ability: Tight Bond: Place next to a card with the same name to double the strength of both cards.
nr_blue_stripes.flavor: I'd do anything for Temeria. Mostly, though, I kill for her.

nr_crinfrid_reavers.ability: Tight Bond: Place next to a card with the same name to double the strength of both cards.
nr_crinfrid_reavers.flavor: Haven't had much luck with monsters of late, so we enlisted.

nr_redanian_foot.flavor: I've bled for Redania! I've killed for Redania... Dammit, I've even raped for Redania!

nr_kaedweni_siege_expert.ability: Morale boost: Adds +1 to all units in the row (excluding itself).
nr_kaedweni_siege_expert.flavor: 'You gotta recalibrate the arm by five degrees.' 'Do what by the what now?'

nr_dun_banner_medic.ability: Medic: Choose one card from your discard pile and play it instantly (no Heroes or Special Cards).
nr_dun_banner_medic.flavor: Stitch red to red, white to white, and everything will be all right.

nr_siege_tower.flavor: I love the clamor of siege towers in the morning. Sounds like victory.

nr_ballista.flavor: 'Usually we give 'em female names.' 'Like Jenny?' 'More like Bertha.'

nr_trebuchet.flavor: Castle won't batter itself down, now will it? Get them trebuchets rollin'!

nr_catapult.ability: Tight Bond: Place next to a card with the same name to double the strength of both cards.
nr_catapult.flavor: The gods help those who have better catapults.

nf_letho.ability: Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities.
nf_letho.flavor: Witchers never die in their beds.

nf_menno.ability: Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities. Medic: Choose one card from your discard pile and play it instantly (no Heroes or Special Cards).
nf_menno.flavor: I'll take an attentive reconnaissance unit over a fine cavalry brigade any day.

nf_morvran.ability: Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities.
nf_morvran.flavor: Summer sun reflecting in the quiet waters of the Alba - that's Nilfgaard to me.

nf_tibor.ability: Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities.
nf_tibor.flavor: Albaaaa! Forward!! Alba! Long live the Emperor!

nf_shilard.ability: Spy: Place on your opponent's battlefield (counts towards your opponent's total) and draw 2 cards from your deck.
nf_shilard.flavor: Warfare is mere sound and fury - diplomacy is what truly shapes history.

nf_stefan_skellen.ability: Spy: Place on your opponent's battlefield (counts towards opponent's total) and draw 2 cards from your deck.
nf_stefan_skellen.flavor: My mark scars the face of our future empress. That is my proudest achievement.

nf_vattier.ability: Spy: Place on your opponent's battlefield (counts towards opponent's total) and draw 2 cards from your deck.
nf_vattier.flavor: There's never been a problem a well-planned assassination couldn't solve.

nf_albrich.flavor: A fireball? Of course. Whatever Your Imperial Majesty wishes.

nf_assire.flavor: Nilfgaardian mages do have a choice: servile submission, or the gallows.

nf_cynthia.flavor: Cynthia's talents can be deadly. She needs a tight leash.

nf_fringilla.flavor: Magic is the highest good. It transcends all borders and divisions.

nf_vanhemar.flavor: For a fire mage, he's not very... flamboyant.

nf_rainfarn.flavor: You'll die as painfully as that pathetic traitor Windhalm did.

nf_renuald.flavor: They say the Impera fear nothing. Untrue. Renuald scares them shitless.

nf_morteisen.flavor: No Nordling pikemen or dwarven spearbearers can hope to best trained cavalry.

nf_sweers.flavor: And hands off the girl! Whatever we may be, we're not savages.

nf_puttkammer.flavor: Learned a lot at Braibant Military Academy. How to scrub potatoes, for instance.

nf_cahir.flavor: His eyes flashed under his winged helmet. Fire gleamed from his sword's blade.

nf_black_archer.flavor: I aim for the knee. Always.

nf_impera_brigade.ability: Tight Bond: Place next to a card with the same name to double the strength of both cards.
nf_impera_brigade.flavor: The Impera Brigade never surrenders. Ever.

nf_nausicaa.ability: Tight Bond: Place next to a card with the same name to double the strength of both cards.
nf_nausicaa.flavor: The Emperor will teach the North discipline.

nf_rotten_mangonel.flavor: The rotten smell brings back childhood memories

nf_siege_engineer.flavor: Wielded correctly, a protractor can be a deadly weapon.

nf_siege_technician.ability: Medic: Choose one card from your discard pile and play it instantly (no Heroes or Special Cards).

nf_fire_scorpion.flavor: The Zerrikania Desert used to be a lush garden. Then these came along.

nf_heavy_fire_scorpion.flavor: Not the best for taking cities, but great for razing them to the ground.

sc_iorveth.ability: Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities.
sc_iorveth.flavor: King or beggar, what's the difference? One dh'oine less.

sc_eithne.ability: Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities.
sc_eithne.flavor: The dryad queen has eyes of molten silver, and a heart of cold-forged steel.

sc_saesenthessis.ability: Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities.
sc_saesenthessis.flavor: Beautiful, pure, fierce - the prefect icon for a rebellion.

sc_isengrim.ability: Morale boost: Adds +1 to all units in the row (excluding itself). Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities.
sc_isengrim.flavor: It dawns on them once they notice my scar: a realization of imminent death.

sc_milva.ability: Morale boost: Adds +1 to all units in the row (excluding itself).
sc_milva.flavor: With each arrow I loose, I think of my da. He'd be proud. I think.

sc_ida_emean.flavor: I am a Sage. My power lies in possessing knowledge. Not sharing it.

sc_toruviel.flavor: I'd gladly kill you from up close, stare in your eyes... But you reek, human.

sc_dennis_cranmer.flavor: I know how to carry out orders, so you can shove your advice up your coal chute.

sc_yaevinn.ability: Agile: Can be placed in either the Close Combat or the Ranged Combat row. Cannot be moved once placed.
sc_yaevinn.flavor: We are the drops of rain that together make a ferocious storm.

sc_barclay_els.ability: Agile: Can be placed in either the Close Combat or the Ranged Combat row. Cannot be moved once placed.
sc_barclay_els.flavor: Our mead smells like piss, do it? Easy to fix - I'll break your fuckin' nose!

sc_riordain.flavor: Stare into their eyes, feast on their terror. Then go in for the kill.

sc_schirru.ability: Scorch - Siege: Destroys your enemy's strongest Siege Combat unit(s) if the combined strength of all his or her Siege Combat units is 10 or more.
sc_schirru.flavor: Time to look death in the face.

sc_dol_blathanna_scout.ability: Agile: Can be placed in either the Close Combat or the Ranged Combat row. Cannot be moved once placed.
sc_dol_blathanna_scout.flavor: They track like hounds, run like deer and kill like cold-hearted bastards.

sc_dol_blathanna_archer.flavor: Take another step, dh'oine. You'd look better with an arrow between your eyes.

sc_elven_skirmisher.ability: Muster: Find any cards with the same name in your deck and play them instantly.
sc_elven_skirmisher.flavor: No matter what you may have heard, elves don't take human scalps. Too much lice.

sc_havekar_healer.ability: Medic: Choose one card from your discard pile and play it instantly (no Heroes or Special Cards).
sc_havekar_healer.flavor: Sure, I'll patch you up. Gonna cost you, though.

sc_havekar_smuggler.ability: Muster: Find any cards with the same name in your deck and play them instantly.
sc_havekar_smuggler.flavor: I fight for whoever's paying the best. Or whoever's easiest to rob.

sc_mahakaman_defender.flavor: I'm telling ye, we're born fer battle - we slash straight at their knees!

sc_vrihedd_brigade_veteran.ability: Agile: Can be placed in either the Close Combat or the Ranged Combat row. Cannot be moved once placed.

sc_vrihedd_brigade_recruit.flavor: Hatred burns brighter than any fire, and cuts deeper than any blade.

mo_leshen.ability: Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities.
mo_leshen.flavor: We never hunt in these woods. Not even if it means the whole village starves.

mo_kayran.ability: Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities. Morale boost: Adds +1 to all units in the row (excluding itself). Agile: Can be placed in either the Close Combat or the Ranged Combat row. Cannot be moved once placed.
mo_kayran.flavor: Kill a kayran? Simple. Take your best sword... then sell it and hire a witcher.

mo_imlerith.ability: Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities.
mo_imlerith.flavor: Ladd nahw! Kill them! Litter the earth with their entrails!

mo_draug.ability: Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities.
mo_draug.flavor: Some men cannot admit defeat. Some keep fighting from beyond the grave.

mo_arachas_behemoth.ability: Muster: Find any cards with the same name in your deck and play them instantly.
mo_arachas_behemoth.flavor: Like a cross between a crab, a spider...and a ploughin' mountain

mo_arachas.ability: Muster: Find any cards with the same name in your deck and play them instantly.
mo_arachas.flavor: Ugly - nature's way of saying 'Stay the fuck away.'

mo_crone_brewess.ability: Muster: Find any cards with the same name in your deck and play them instantly.
mo_crone_brewess.flavor: We'll cut you up, boy. A fine broth you will make.

mo_crone_weavess.ability: Muster: Find any cards with the same name in your deck and play them instantly.
mo_crone_weavess.flavor: I sense your pain. I see your fear...

mo_crone_whispess.ability: Muster: Find any cards with the same name in your deck and play them instantly.
mo_crone_whispess.flavor: I'd be your best - and last.

mo_vampire_katakan.ability: Muster: Find any cards with the same name in your deck and play them instantly.
mo_vampire_katakan.flavor: Drinking the blood of the Continent since the Conjunction.

mo_vampire_ekimmara.ability: Muster: Find any cards with the same name in your deck and play them instantly
mo_vampire_ekimmara.flavor: Who would think overgrown bats would have a taste for gaudy jewelry?

mo_vampire_fleder.ability: Muster: Find any cards with the same name in your deck and play them instantly
mo_vampire_fleder.flavor: Higher vampires embrace their victims. Fleders rip them to shreds.

mo_vampire_garkain.ability: Muster: Find any cards with the same name in your deck and play them instantly
mo_vampire_garkain.flavor: Blood-drinkers and corpse-eaters so foul their very ugliness paralyses foes.

mo_vampire_bruxa.ability: Muster: Find any cards with the same name in your deck and play them instantly
mo_vampire_bruxa.flavor: A vile, bloodthirsty, man-eating hag. Kind of like my mother-in-law.

mo_ghoul.ability: Muster: Find any cards with the same name in your deck and play them instantly.
mo_ghoul.flavor: If ghouls are part of the Circle of Life... then it's a damn vicious circle.

mo_nekker.ability: Muster: Find any cards with the same name in your deck and play them instantly.
mo_nekker.flavor: Damn things are almost cute, if you ignore the whole vicious killer aspect.

mo_toad.ability: Scorch - Ranged: Destroy your enemy's strongest Ranged Combat unit(s) if the combined strength of all his or her Ranged Combat units is 10 or more.
mo_toad.flavor: Big. Bad. Ugly. Squats in the sewers.

mo_frightener.flavor: "What have I done?" the mage cried out, frightened of his own creation.

mo_werewolf.flavor: Wolves aren't as bad as they say. Werewolves, though - they're worse.

mo_fiend.flavor: A fiend looks a bit like a deer. An enormous, evil deer.

mo_plague_maiden.flavor: The sick rave about a boil-pocked woman surrounded by herds of rabid rats...

mo_griffin.flavor: Griffins like to toy with their prey. Eat 'em alive, piece by piece.

mo_forktail.flavor: Fork tails... Bah! Fuckers' tails're more like cleavers.

mo_botchling.flavor: Admit your mistakes and bury them proper - else they'll come back to haunt you.

mo_foglet.flavor: Fog creeps on little cat feet. Foglets creep over the bodies of their victims.

mo_wyvern.flavor: Imagine a cross between a winged snake and a nightmare. Wyverns are worse.

mo_harpy.ability: Agile: Can be placed in either the Close Combat or the Ranged Combat row. Cannot be moved once placed.
mo_harpy.flavor: There are many species of harpy, and all are kleptomaniacs.

mo_celaeno_harpy.ability: Agile: Can be placed in either the Close Combat or the Ranged Combat row. Cannot be moved once placed.
mo_celaeno_harpy.flavor: Common harpies feed on carrion. Celaeno harpies... they feed on dreams.

mo_cockatrice.flavor: Born of an egg laid by a cockerel... if you believe such peasant drivel.

mo_endrega.flavor: The nest! Take out the nest, or the bastards'll just keep coming!

mo_grave_hag.flavor: Their long tongues're for slurping marrow - and whipping prep.

mo_gargoyle.flavor: Ancient sculptors' nightmarish fantasies, brought to life by bored mages.

mo_earth_elemental.flavor: How to fight an earth elemental? You don't. You run. Fast as you can.

mo_ice_giant.flavor: Fled one time in my life. From the Ice Giant. And I'm not a bit ashamed.

sk_cerys.ability: Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities. Summon Shield Maidens: Summons all Shield Maidens from deck and hand.
sk_cerys.flavor: They call me Sparrowhawk, know why? Because I eat rats like you for breakfast.

sk_hjalmar.ability: Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities.
sk_hjalmar.flavor: Instead of mournin' the fallen, let's drink to their memory!

sk_ermion.ability: Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities. Mardroeme: Triggers transformation of all Berserker cards on the same row.
sk_ermion.flavor: Only the ignorant dismiss the importance of myths.

sk_hemdall.ability: Hero: Not affected by any Special Cards or abilities.
sk_hemdall.flavor: When the time of the White Frost comes, Hemdall will sound the call for battle.

sk_kambi.ability: When this card is removed from the battlefield, it summons a powerful new Unit Card to take its place.
sk_kambi.flavor: When the time comes, the cockerel Kambi shall crow and awaken Hemdall.

sk_olaf.ability: Agile: Can be placed in either the Close Combat or the Ranged Combat row. Cannot be moved once placed. Morale boost: Adds +1 to all units in the row (excluding itself).
sk_olaf.flavor: Many've tried to defeat Olaf. But won't hear about it from them - they're dead.

sk_blueboy_lugos.flavor: I'm damn near ready to puke from boredom.

sk_svanrige.flavor: The emperor also thought him an accidental king. At first.

sk_donar.flavor: I've gathered all the jarls together. Now make your case.

sk_holger.flavor: Now let's drink to Emperor of Nilfgaard - may his prick forever stay limp!

sk_udalryk.flavor: Haaaargh! After me, if ye've the bollocks!

sk_birna_bran.ability: Medic: Choose one card from your discard pile and play it instantly (no Heroes or Special Cards).
sk_birna_bran.flavor: Skellige must have a strong king. No matter what it takes.

sk_clan_dimun_pirate.ability: Scorch: Kills the strongest card(s) on the battlefield.
sk_clan_dimun_pirate.flavor: Can see the fear in their eyes. Fear o' me... fear o' Clan Dimun!

sk_shield_maiden.ability: Tight Bond: Place next to a card with the same name to double the strength of both cards.
sk_shield_maiden.flavor: They'll shatter on our shields like waves on a rocky shore.

sk_an_craite_warrior.ability: Tight Bond: Place next to a card with the same name to double the strength of both cards.
sk_an_craite_warrior.flavor: I'll bring the an Craites such glory, bards'll go hoarse singin' me praises!

sk_brokvar_archer.flavor: So ye can hit a movin' target at two hundred paces. Me, too. In a storm.

sk_war_longship.ability: Tight Bond: Place next to a card with the same name to double the strength of both cards.
sk_war_longship.flavor: They say Hemdall's heart swells whenever the longships sail out on a raid.

sk_light_longship.ability: Muster: Find any cards with the same name in your deck and play them instantly.
sk_light_longship.flavor: Escape them? In the waters of Skellige? Good luck.

sk_draig_bon_dhu.ability: Commander's Horn: Doubles the strength of all unit cards in that row. Limited to 1 per row.
sk_draig_bon_dhu.flavor: Hear ye now the tale of the heroic deeds of Clan an Craite.

sk_young_berserker.ability: Transforms into a bear when a Mardroeme card is on its row.

sk_berserker.ability: Transforms into a bear when a Mardroeme card is on its row.

sk_mardroeme.ability: Triggers transformation of all Berserker cards on the same row.
sk_mardroeme.flavor: Eat enough of them, and the world will never be the same...

nr_leader_steel_forged.ability: Destroy your enemy's strongest Siege unit(s) if the combined strength of all his or her Siege units is 10 or more.

nr_leader_siegemaster.ability: Doubles the strength of all your Siege units (unless a Commander's Horn is also present on that row).
nr_leader_siegemaster.flavor: A well-aimed ballista razes not just the enemy's walls, but his morale as well.

nr_leader_kingdom_temeria.ability: Pick an Impenetrable Fog card from your deck and play it instantly.
nr_leader_kingdom_temeria.flavor: It is natural and beautiful that a man should love his sister.

nr_leader_lord_commander.ability: Clear any weather effects (resulting from Biting Frost, Torrential Rain or Impenetrable Fog cards) in play.
nr_leader_lord_commander.flavor: Sod advisors and their schemes. I place my trust in my solders' blades.

nr_leader_son_of_medell.ability: Destroy your enemy's strongest Ranged Combat unit(s) if the combined strength of all his or her Ranged Combat units is 10 or more.
nr_leader_son_of_medell.flavor: Dammit, I rule this land and I refuse to creep around its corners.

nf_leader_imperial_majesty.ability: His Imperial Majesty: Pick a Torrential Rain card from your deck and play it instantly.
nf_leader_imperial_majesty.flavor: The skies wept when my Pavetta died. They will not weep for me.

nf_leader_emperor.ability: Emperor of Nilfgaard: Look at 3 random cards from your opponent's hand.
nf_leader_emperor.flavor: Your motives do not interest me. Only results.

nf_leader_white_flame.ability: The White Flame: Cancel your opponent's Leader Ability.
nf_leader_white_flame.flavor: A sword is but one of many tools at a ruler's disposal.

nf_leader_relentless.ability: The Relentless: Draw a card from your opponent's discard pile.
nf_leader_relentless.flavor: They do not call me the Patient. Take care they do not call you the Headless.

nf_leader_invader.ability: Invader of the North: Abilities that restore a unit to the battlefield restore a randomly-chosen unit. Affects both players.
nf_leader_invader.flavor: Emperors command multitudes, yet cannot control two things: their time and their hearts.

sc_leader_daisy.ability: Daisy of the Valley: Draw an extra card at the beginning of the battle.
sc_leader_daisy.flavor: The Elder Races have forgotten more than humans can ever hope to know.

sc_leader_pureblood.ability: Pureblood Elf: Pick a Biting Frost card from your deck and play it instantly.
sc_leader_pureblood.flavor: Ash shall fertilize the soil. By spring, the valley shall bloom once more.

sc_leader_queen.ability: Queen of Dol Blathanna: Destroy your enemy's strongest Close Combat unit(s) if the combined strength of all his or her Close Combat units is 10 or more.
sc_leader_queen.flavor: To live in peace, we first must kill. This is human oppression's cruel finale.

sc_leader_beautiful.ability: The Beautiful: Doubles the strength of all your Ranged Combat units (unless a Commander's Horn is also present on that row).
sc_leader_beautiful.flavor: Do not let my beauty distract your aim.

sc_leader_hope.ability: Hope of the Aen Seidhe: Move agile units to whichever valid row maximizes their strength (don't move units already in optimal row).
sc_leader_hope.flavor: Daede sian caente, Aen Seidhe en'allane ael coeden...

mo_leader_red_riders.ability: Double the strength of all your Close Combat units (unless a Commander's horn is also present on that row).
mo_leader_red_riders.flavor: Have some dignity. You know how this will end.

mo_leader_bringer_death.ability: Restore a card from your discard pile to your hand.
mo_leader_bringer_death.flavor: Go on. Show me your spins, pirouettes and feints. I want to watch.

mo_leader_destroyer.ability: Discard 2 card and draw 1 card of your choice from your deck.

sk_leader_crach.ability: Shuffle all cards from each player's graveyard back into their decks.
sk_leader_crach.flavor: A king's gotta be wise. A king's gotta command respect. A king's gotta have stones.

sk_leader_bran.ability: Units only lose half their Strength in bad weather conditions.
sk_leader_bran.flavor: No one can replace Bran. Though they're sure to try.
